items.title: Passengers held on cruise ship in France after gastroenteritis outbreak
items.dek: The ship set sail from Belfast on Friday and is currently at a port in Bordeaux.
items.body: The ship set sail from Belfast on Friday and is currently at a port in Bordeaux.

items.title: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice
items.dek: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.
items.body: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.

items.title: Gaza sisters win prize for turning rubble into reusable bricks
items.dek: Displaced teenagers Farah and Tala wanted to 'turn destruction into something useful'.
items.body: Displaced teenagers Farah and Tala wanted to 'turn destruction into something useful'.
